docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE IN THE AMOUNT OF $101.63. (TRANSACTION ID # 78054702) FILED BY PLAINTIFF BRICK & TIMBER, INC
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT KAUFMAN, CASSANDRA
